cooccur 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Co-occurrence Networks with IMDB Movie Data
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

actor_genres
IMDB actor-genre long table (1970-2024)
actors
IMDB actor-movie long table (1970-2024)
as_cograph()
Convert to cograph network
as_igraph()
Convert to igraph
as_matrix()
Extract the co-occurrence matrix
as_netobject()
Convert to Nestimate netobject
as_tidygraph()
Convert to tidygraph
cooccurrence() co()
Build a co-occurrence network
launch_app()
Launch the cooccur Shiny explorer
movies
IMDB movie metadata (1970-2024)
plot(<cooccurrence>)
Plot a cooccurrence network
print(<cooccurrence>)
Print a cooccurrence edge list
summary(<cooccurrence>)
Summarise a cooccurrence network

Developed by Mohammed Saqr, Sonsoles López-Pernas, Kamila Misiejuk.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
